name: clamav-daemon
title: clamav-daemon
summary: anti-virus utility for Unix - scanner daemon
description:
anti-virus utility for Unix - scanner daemon
Clam AntiVirus is an anti-virus toolkit for Unix. The main purpose of
this software is the integration with mail servers (attachment
scanning). The package provides a flexible and scalable
multi-threaded daemon in the clamav-daemon package, a command-line
scanner in the clamav package, and a tool for automatic updating via
the Internet in the clamav-freshclam package. The programs are based
on libclamav, which can be used by other software.
.
This package contains the daemon featuring:
- fast, multi-threaded daemon;
- easy integration with MTA's;
- support for on-access scanning;
- remote scanning;
- able to be run supervised by daemon.

commands.name: clamonacc
commands.description: an anti-virus on-access scanning daemon and clamd client

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use clamconf because anti-virus utility for Unix - scanner daemon.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use clamconf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `clamconf [options]` as documented upstream for clamconf.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair clamconf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `clamconf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install clamav. anti-virus utility for Unix - scanner daemon.

documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: clamconf - Clam AntiVirus configuration utility.
